title: Akriti Chadda Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Akriti Chadda Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Akriti Chadda
Khoury Alumni
MS in Computer Science ’97
Seattle Campus
While working in Seattle, Akriti Chadda found herself surrounded by software engineers, and she began to wonder if there was a place for her in the tech industry. Now an alumnus of the Align program, she’s grateful for the community she found at Khoury College, united by the goal of increasing representation in the field.
The one word that comes to my mind when I think about Khoury is ‘grateful,’ and it’s not just because of the skills that I learned over the years … I think the community that we formed just by virtue of the fact that we were all working towards the same goal of increasing representation in tech is absolutely wonderful
Akriti Chadda, Align MSCS ’97
Explore all Khoury Stories
